seo.title: Xiangling Build Guide (Coming Soon) — GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Xiangling build guide for Genshin Impact v5.6. Best weapons (The Catch R5, Staff of Homa), optimal artifacts (Emblem of Severed Fate), team compositions (Raiden National), and rotation guide.

tldr_weapon: The Catch R5 (Bis: Staff of Homa)
intro: Xiangling is the best 4-star unit in Genshin. Her burst (Pyronado) deals massive off-field Pyro damage that snapshots her stats. Essential in every meta team since launch.
weapon_bottom_line: The Catch R5 is free and excellent. Prioritize ER — XL needs to burst every rotation.

weapons.name: The Catch R5
weapons.notes: Free from fishing. +32% burst DMG. Best F2P.

weapons.name: Favonius Lance
weapons.notes: Team battery. High ER substat. Provides particles for the whole team.

main_stats.circlet_note: Aim for 60%+ CR. XL crits a lot.

sub_priority: 1. Energy Recharge — 180-200% minimum. Non-negotiable for burst uptime.
2. CRIT Rate / CRIT DMG — 1:2 ratio. Aim for 60/120.
3. ATK% — more damage after ER requirements met.
4. Elemental Mastery — only in reaction teams (Vape/Melt).

teams.name: Team 1: Raiden National
teams.desc: The golden standard. XL + XQ + Bennett + Raiden. XL's burst snaphots Bennett's ATK buff. Devastating.

teams.name: Team 2: Xiangling Overload
teams.desc: XL + Chevreuse + Fischl + (flex). Overload meta with Pyro resonance. High ceiling.

rotation_code: Bennett Q E → Xingqiu E Q E → Xiangling Q E → Raiden E → Raiden Q → N3C × 4
mistakes: ❌ Not enough ER. Xiangling needs 180%+ to burst every rotation. Below 160% = rotation fail.
❌ Burst before Bennett Q. XL's burst snapshots ATK buff — always Bennett Q first.
pro_teaser_code: // Pro DMG simulation — unlock for full data
artifact_why: 4-Piece Emblem of Severed Fate is the optimal set for Xiangling.
